since_last: 35% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.38%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +0.11% · Gold +0.32% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 35% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.38%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.38%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.76%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at -3.81%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +2.64%, EQIX +2.43%, ADBE +1.80%, ADBE +1.80%, INOD +1.76%. Laggards: ARM -3.81%, DELL -3.81%, INTC -3.78%, MRVL -3.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.34% at $157.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
